content.full_text:
DATE: October 29, 1982
Advice No. M-82-179

TO: Advice Files 82013, 82036, 84206,
    Jay, Jeanne, Lynn

FROM: Diane Maura Fishburn

RE: Reporting by Federal Candidate's Committees as Major Donors.

In an advice letter to Jonathan Redding (A-81-034), I concluded that federal candidates' committees did not have to file as recipient committees if they participated in state or local elections.

It has been brought to our attention that several federal candidates' committees are participating in California elections to the tune of $5,000 and more. In light of this fact and our previous advice, we have determined that these committees must file campaign statements as major donors including late contribution reports.

DMF:km
